comment.body:
Ya I opened a NVDA put at $99.60ish based on my own convictions. However, I was definitely concerned with all the relentless call buying. I thought maybe the market was just closing all the sold calls yesterday by buying them back.

However, excluding indices, the call volume was insane. Lopsided by over $60M spread. And price didn’t react. It didn’t feel right at all. But went ahead with it given Alma’s signal. Should’ve taken profit on the two spike downs today.

comment.body:
It seems that the tug of war is still going on... 
China of course is trying to woo the EU; it remains to see how Europe will react...
Putin... meanwhile is wooing Trump...
Any potentially bullish headline for the BRICS can be a bearish for the US... On the other hand, this account will of course tweet in favor of China and the BRICS...
